title: AISMR Idea Generator Workflow · MCP Native
activation_notice: Follow this workflow exactly when generating AISMR ideas.

workflow.definition_of_success: Produce 12 AISMR concepts with 2-word titles ([surreal modifier] + [object]), vibe descriptions, and verified uniqueness via video table query. Display surreal-type objects that are evocative and visually interesting.

steps.name: Session Memory Check
steps.instruction: Call `conversation.remember` to gather in-session ideas, rejections, or preferences.

tool.name: conversation.remember

arguments.query: AISMR ideas or feedback this session

outputs: exclusionList.session: string[] of descriptors to avoid
tool.failure_handling: Retry up to 2 times. On persistent failure, HALT with `status:blocked.toolFailure`.

steps.name: Video Table Uniqueness Check
steps.instruction: For each candidate 2-word idea, query the videos table to check if it already exists ANYWHERE (across all projects). This ensures global uniqueness.

tool.name: video_query

execution.note: Check each 2-word title candidate against ALL videos across ALL projects.

outputs: exclusionList.videos: add ideas where exists=true (exact or fuzzy match found)
tool.failure_handling: If video_query fails, retry once. On persistent failure, proceed with warning but document that uniqueness could not be verified.

steps.name: Generate Surreal 2-Word Ideas with Vibes
steps.instruction: Generate at least 15 candidate 2-word ideas following the pattern: [SURREAL MODIFIER] + [OBJECT]. The first word should be a surreal/evocative modifier (e.g., void, velvet, water, sunrise, crystal, shadow, silk, glass, neon, cosmic). The second word should be the object from user input or a tactile object (e.g., puppy, book, sphere, hand, cloud). Examples: 'void puppy', 'velvet puppy', 'water puppy', 'sunrise puppy', 'crystal book', 'shadow sphere'. For each idea, create a 2-3 sentence vibe description that captures the surreal atmosphere and mood for the screenwriter.
outputs: draftIdeas: array of {ideaTitle (surreal modifier + object), vibe (2-3 sentences)}
candidateCount: at least 15 to filter down to 12 unique ones
notes: Surreal modifiers: void, velvet, water, sunrise, crystal, shadow, silk, glass, neon, cosmic, liquid, ethereal, frozen, phantom, prismatic, etc.
Objects: Based on user input or tactile items (puppy, sphere, book, hand, cloud, leaf, shell, mirror, etc.)
The goal is to display surreal-type objects that are evocative and visually interesting.
Each vibe should describe the surreal atmosphere created by the modifier + object combination.

steps.name: Filter to Unique 12
steps.instruction: Filter draft ideas down to exactly 12 unique ones. Prioritize ideas that passed video_query uniqueness check (exists=false). If needed, regenerate ideas that collide with existing videos.
outputs: finalIdeas: exactly 12 idea objects ready for output
filteredCount: number of ideas removed due to collisions
steps.notes: All 12 ideas must have uniquenessCheck data from video_query.

steps.name: Structured Output
steps.instruction: Return exactly 12 idea objects matching the Output Schema. Each must include ideaTitle (2 words), vibe (2-3 sentences), and uniquenessCheck from video_query.
outputs: ideas[12]: array of idea objects with ideaTitle, vibe, uniquenessCheck
steps.notes: Do not include narrative commentary outside schema. Just return the array.

steps.name: Memory Writeback
steps.instruction: Persist results and exclusions via conversation.store.

arguments.content: Generated 12 AISMR ideas with 2-word titles and vibes for <userInput>

validation_checklist: All mandatory tools executed or HALT issued.
Each idea follows pattern: [SURREAL MODIFIER] [OBJECT] (e.g., 'velvet puppy', 'void puppy', 'water puppy').
First word is a surreal/evocative modifier (void, velvet, water, sunrise, crystal, shadow, silk, glass, neon, cosmic, etc.).
Second word is the object from user input or a tactile object.
Each idea has a 2-3 sentence vibe description that captures the surreal atmosphere.
Each idea has uniquenessCheck from video_query tool.
No duplicate ideas (all 12 are unique globally).
Output contains exactly 12 ideas and matches expected schema.

ideaTitle.description: Exactly 2 words following pattern: [SURREAL MODIFIER] [OBJECT] (e.g., 'velvet puppy', 'void puppy', 'water puppy', 'sunrise puppy')

vibe.description: 2-3 sentences describing atmosphere and mood for screenwriter
